---
title: "Table 1"
format:
  html:
    df-print: paged
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(forcats)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
```

## Retrieve metadata

```{r}
PRETTY_metadata <- read_tsv("../data/PRETTY_metadata.tsv")
```

## Select variables of interest

```{r}
t1 <- PRETTY_metadata |> select(id, group,
                      age, sex, mode,
                      paisorigen, ethnic,
                      edulvl,
                      smoke,
                      hta,
                      nadircd4,
                      CD4_0, CD8_0,
                      CD4CD8_0,
                      CD4_24m, CD8_24m,
                      CD4CD8_24)
```

## Compute Table 1 summary statistics

```{r}
vars_categoricas <- c("sex", "mode", "paisorigen", "ethnic",
                      "edulvl", "smoke", "hta")

vars_continuas <- c("age", "nadircd4", "CD4_0", "CD8_0",
                     "CD4CD8_0", "CD4_24m", "CD8_24m", "CD4CD8_24")

t1_all <- t1 |>
  mutate(group = as.character(group)) |>
  bind_rows(
    t1 |> mutate(group = "Total")
  )

fila_n <- t1_all |>
  group_by(group) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

n_total <- fila_n |> 
  filter(group == "Total") |> 
  pull(n)

fila_n <- fila_n |>
  mutate(
    pct = n / n_total * 100,
    value = sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", n, pct),
    row = "n"
  ) |>
  select(group, row, value)

tabla_continua <- t1_all |>
  group_by(group) |>
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(vars_continuas),
      list(
        mean = ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd   = ~ sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(
    -group,
    names_to = c("variable", "stat"),
    names_sep = "_(?=[^_]+$)"
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = stat, values_from = value) |>
  mutate(value = sprintf("%.1f (%.1f)", mean, sd)) |>
  select(group, variable, value)

tabla_categorica <- t1_all |>
  select(group, all_of(vars_categoricas)) |>
  pivot_longer(
    -group,
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "level"
  ) |>
  group_by(group, variable, level) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") |>
  mutate(
    pct = n / sum(n) * 100,
    value = sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", n, pct)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(group, variable, level, value)

tabla1_tidy <- bind_rows(
  tabla_continua |> mutate(level = NA),
  tabla_categorica
) |>
  arrange(variable, level)

tabla1_final <- bind_rows(
  fila_n,
  tabla1_tidy |> unite(row, variable, level, sep = ": ", na.rm = TRUE)
) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = group,
    values_from = value
  )


```

Export:

```{r}
# tabla1_final|> write_tsv("../data/table1_values.tsv")
```
